allowedModels.label: Allowed models (empty = all)
allowedModels.placeholder: Type a model id and press Enter

outputFormat.label: Output format
outputFormat.help: Render responses in this format regardless of which endpoint is called — handy for downstream systems. Default follows the endpoint.

reveal.title: API key created
reveal.warning: Copy this key now. For security it is shown only once and cannot be retrieved again.

messages.createdNoKey: Token created, but the server did not return the full key.
messages.copyManual: Could not copy automatically — select and copy manually.
